prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Z20LET** (2.0L turbocharged Ecotec from the Opel Astra OPC/VXR) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (8.8:1 compression), and **ARP head studs** for 350+ HP on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise boost control (22 psi peak)

Full **TTE (Turbo Technics Engineering) Stage 3+ drivetrain upgrade** including a **Quaife ATB differential**, **GKN tripod CV joints**, and a **lightweight aluminum flywheel** paired with a **Sachs Performance clutch** for improved throttle response and durability

**Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (20mm drop) and **polyurethane bushings** (SuperPro) for chassis rigidity, paired with **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (330mm discs) from the Lotus Elise S2 for superior braking performance
estetica: **RML Speedster-specific carbon fiber widebody kit** (front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** for weight reduction and aggressive stance
**Hella Rallye 3000 Super White headlights** with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **custom LED taillights** (Lotus Elise S2 retrofit) for a modernized look while maintaining OEM+ integration

**OMP Carbon Fiber racing seats** (fixed-back) with **Schroth 4-point harnesses** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (320mm, suede) for a motorsport-inspired interior, paired with a **custom aluminum shift knob** (short-throw adapter for the F23 gearbox)
